facts.fact: Farstrider patrol life is mounted, quiet, and highly responsive; riders and horses are trained to live with ward-stones as part of routine border work.
Routine Amani troll pressure remains active on the southeastern frontier.
Border posts secure prisoners by disarming them, restricting witnesses, preserving evidence, and escalating unusual disturbances to senior authority.
Sylvanas's mounted escort in chapter2 includes Cyndia on the left, Lyriel on the right, Neral at the rear, and one unnamed ranger as extra saddle support.
Farstrider field discipline is shown as near-wordless formation change: flanks widen outside the wards, rear spacing opens, and horses are controlled through panic without the line breaking.

By chapter3 Sylvanas uses pair-sweeps, perimeter hold, and spoor verification before sending a formal warning, showing Farstrider doctrine applied to civilian plague investigation as if it were enemy movement.
Neral and the unnamed escort ranger split north with the dispatch and survivor, reducing the active southbound investigation party to Sylvanas, Jaina, Cyndia, and Lyriel.

By chapter4 Farstrider field discipline extends cleanly into village containment: horses settled fast, doors and yard lanes covered, prisoners moved under layered watch, and silence treated as actionable warning.
Small investigative teams can pivot from escort duty to evidence preservation and prisoner control without changing command shape.
Sylvanas reads manifests, wagon routes, and feeder-road splits with the same logic she would apply to troop movement and supply lines.
Farstrider field discipline now extends to depot work: horses kept ready, rooflines claimed, blind angles taken, and cleaned yards treated as hostile space.
The chosen southwest approach brings the party near Arthas's current campaign zone, and the plan is to pass through rather than join it.
Chapter6 establishes Strahnbrad as a live Lordaeron field camp with Silver Hand presence, quartermasters, healers, runners, and forge work all operating at once.
Arthas has almost no spare riders because the Blackrock-raider fight and reinforcement requests are consuming current military capacity.

Chapter7 establishes Andorhal district security as a real tactical surface: militia watch turns run on predictable intervals, yard lines can be exploited in six-minute gaps, and the team now splits perimeter, magical breach, and live capture roles with military precision.
